steps: Log in or create a CircleCI account
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g. 'my-agent')
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal API Token
credential_fields.description: Your CircleCI personal API token, sent in the Circle-Token header

notes: Free tier available with limited build minutes
Token is shown only once at creation — copy and store it securely
Token is sent via the Circle-Token HTTP header (not Authorization)
Tokens grant full API access to your account; treat like a password
Rate limit: 100 requests per second per token
